wins: Strong revenue growth across 3 of 5 businesses with 8% overall revenue increase
Record equities revenue with significant improvement in sentiment
Positive operating leverage across all businesses
Successful execution of transformation initiatives with progress on risk and control
Capital return to shareholders with $3.75 billion in share repurchases year-to-date
risks: Macro uncertainty affecting client behavior and inflows
Potential for higher credit losses in the second half
Seasonality in revenue growth with a step-down in the second half
Regulatory uncertainty and potential changes in capital requirements
Ongoing transformation costs and stranded costs
